* **Consent for Swiss EPR with Encounter exclusions**

## Example Consent: Consent for Swiss EPR with Encounter exclusions

Profile: [CH Core EPR-Consent](StructureDefinition-ch-core-epr-consent.md)

## Participants

* **Role**: Patient
  * **Details**: [Elisabeth Broennimann](Patient-ElisabethBroennimannByBFH.md)
* **Role**: Manager
  * **Details**: Stammgemeinschaft XYZ

This consent is made under the regulation CH EPR Consent and the policy .

* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): permit
  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-qi-hidden.png)deny
  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

  "resourceType" : "Consent",

    "display" : "Stammgemeinschaft XYZ"

  "policy" : [{
    "authority" : "https://www.admin.ch/opc/de/classified-compilation/20111795/index.html"

  "policyRule" : {
    "coding" : [{
      "system" : "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/consentpolicycodes",

      "code" : "ch-epr"

  "provision" : {
    "type" : "deny",
    "data" : [{
      "meaning" : "instance",
      "reference" : {
        "reference" : "Encounter/EncounterAccidentBroennimann",
        "type" : "Encounter"

    }]
  }
